title: Ensuring access to behavioral health services for children involved with state agencies
summary: For legislation to ensure access to behavioral health services for children involved with state agencies. Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities.

actions.action: Referred to the Joint Committee on Children, Families and Persons with Disabilities
Hearing scheduled for 09/09/2025 from 1:00 PM-5:00 PM in B-2
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the Joint Committee on Health Care Financing
Accompanied a study order, see S2931
